name: copilot-compact
description: Rewrite Copilot/OAI-compatible conversation compaction requests from /responses to /responses/compact.

copilotCompact.enabled.description: Enable rewriting detected conversation-compaction requests from /responses to /responses/compact.

copilotCompact.targetHosts.description: Optional host allow-list. Empty means all hosts. Example: ["newapi.boyweb.net", "openai.boyweb.net"].

copilotCompact.compactPathSuffix.description: Path segment appended to /responses for compact requests. Default rewrites /v1/responses to /v1/responses/compact.

enumDescriptions: Only rewrite requests that match Copilot's conversation-summary compaction prompt.
Rewrite every POST request whose URL ends with /responses. Use only for debugging.

copilotCompact.logLevel.description: Output verbosity. Logs never include request bodies or API keys.
